# prepare(forError:)

**Instance Method**

Performs any necessary setup or configuration when an authentication error occurs.

## Declaration

```swift
func prepare(forError error: any Error)
```

## Parameters

- **error**: An object representing the authentication error. Your File Provider extension can pass additional information in the error’s [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSError/userInfo] property.

## Discussion

While your file provider is enumerating its content, the system calls this method whenever your file provider returns an [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/FileProvider/NSFileProviderErrorDomain] error with a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/FileProvider/NSFileProviderError/Code/notAuthenticated] code. Use this method to present an interface to authenticate the user.

## Working with Actions

- **prepare(forAction:itemIdentifiers:)**: Performs any necessary setup or configuration for the specified action.
- **extensionContext**: The extension context provided by the host app.
- **FPUIActionExtensionContext**: An extension context provided to File Provider UI extensions.
